title: Spicy Fluffy Dum Stir-fry
description: A high-protein-friendly brunch-mood Uruguayan dish featuring spicy dumplings and vanilla bean paste in a savory sauce.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok or skillet over medium heat.
Add finely chopped onions and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Add chili peppers, stir for another minute.
Fold in ground beef or chicken, cook until browned, then add salt and pepper to taste.
Pour in vanilla bean paste and soy sauce, mix well to combine all ingredients.
Gently fold dumplings into the mixture. Cover and let simmer for about 5 minutes.
Serve hot with a side of fresh fruit or toast.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
